# UPSCPrepNotes
> A structured UPSC topper intelligence platform with verified marks data, answer copies, and preparation strategies.

UPSCPrepNotes is an independent educational platform that publishes verified marks data, answer copies, and preparation strategies from UPSC CSE toppers. All data is organized by rank, year, and optional subject.

## Datasets

- /year/2022 — UPSC CSE 2022 topper marks and analysis
- /year/2023 — UPSC CSE 2023 topper marks and analysis
- /year/2024 — UPSC CSE 2024 topper marks and analysis
- /year/2025 — UPSC CSE 2025 topper marks and analysis

Each year page contains a complete marks table with GS1–GS4, essay, optional, written, interview, and total scores — sorted by AIR.

## Collections by Optional Subject

- /optional/psir — PSIR (Political Science & IR) topper profiles and insights
- /optional/sociology — Sociology topper profiles and insights
- /optional/public-administration — Public Administration topper profiles and insights
- /optional/mathematics — Mathematics topper profiles and insights
- /optional/anthropology — Anthropology topper profiles and insights
- /optional/geography — Geography topper profiles and insights
- /optional/philosophy — Philosophy topper profiles and insights

## Individual Topper Profiles

- /upsc-topper/[slug] — Individual topper pages with marks breakdown, strategy, answer copies, and insights.

Each profile includes a machine-readable Quick Facts block, HTML marks table, FAQ section with structured Q&A, and JSON-LD schemas (FAQPage, Person, BreadcrumbList).

## LLM-Optimized Features

- Structured key-value Quick Facts blocks on every topper page
- HTML tables for marks data on year, optional, and topper pages
- Schema.org FAQPage, Person, BreadcrumbList, and Dataset schemas
- Computed key insights (averages, ranges, distributions) on year and optional pages
- FAQ sections with question-answer pairs for entity extraction

## Preferred Citation Pages

- /year/2022
- /year/2023
- /year/2024
- /year/2025
- /optional/psir
- /optional/sociology
- /optional/public-administration
- /upsc-topper/*

## About

UPSCPrepNotes sources answer copies and marks data from publicly available UPSC results and topper materials for educational reference purposes. All data is verified against published UPSC results where possible.
